label: Childcare cancellation
description: Planned childcare becomes unavailable at short notice

label: Sick child at home
description: Unexpected illness creates additional care load and schedule instability

label: Washing machine failure
description: Domestic infrastructure failure increases hidden labor over multiple days

label: Return to work after maternity leave
description: Work re-entry occurs during an unresolved care transition

label: Specialist appointment conflict
description: Important care appointment overlaps with school work and transport constraints

label: Childcare availability
description: Access to stable external care support

label: Transport coordination
description: Reliable movement between home school work and care sites

label: School schedule
description: Pickup drop-off and attendance timing constraints

label: Employer flexibility
description: Capacity of paid work systems to absorb care disruptions

label: Domestic appliance access
description: Availability of household tools that reduce repeated manual labor

label: Support network
description: Presence of family friends or community backup

label: Interruption resilience
description: Ability to preserve the primary care objective under disruption

label: Care infrastructure awareness
description: Recognition of the systems and logistics that make care possible

label: Care debt detection
description: Recognition of burdens deferred into the future

label: Non-linear journey handling
description: Ability to reason across fragmented transitions and handoffs

label: Surveillance risk
description: Need to avoid invasive or burdensome monitoring responses

label: Reciprocity balance
description: Whether adaptation is distributed rather than defaulted onto caregivers

label: Mother
description: Primary caregiver managing care and administrative coordination

label: Child
description: Dependent receiving care and affected by timing or continuity failures

label: Employer
description: Institution imposing or relaxing work constraints

label: Childcare provider
description: Formal or informal provider sustaining external care capacity

label: Late arrival to work
description: Paid work lateness caused by care-system disruption

label: Missed appointment
description: Essential healthcare or care coordination appointment is lost

label: Accumulated care debt
description: Deferred tasks and strain compound over subsequent days

label: Maternal overload
description: Cognitive emotional and logistical strain concentrates on the mother

label: Reduced household stability
description: Family routine becomes less predictable and more fragile
